gates.diagnostic: Junior baseline cadence is parameterized rather than hard-coded.
Mixed strategy Middle endpoint time from shared post-promotion snapshot.
Combined accepted Junior baseline and mixed Middle endpoint time.
Counts Junior upgrades/promotion plus Middle purchases.
Meaningful decisions are signature-deduped after material state changes.
Low-click scenario must complete from the common post-promotion snapshot.

Offline session records no Money gain until explicit Report.
Offline elapsed time is capped before production is calculated.

gates.diagnostic: Controlled state starts below the milestone with enough earned Money for one multi-level Buy Max transaction.

gates.diagnostic: Compares level-first, support-first, mixed and skip-supports endpoint times.

gates.target: capstone reachable in dedicated capstone scenario
gates.diagnostic: Dedicated capstone scenario continues past endpoint to the level cap.

gates.target: capstone not reached before ordinary endpoints
gates.diagnostic: Ordinary endpoint scenarios must not hit the capstone before completion.

gates.target: all non-capstone Middle scenarios complete endpoint
gates.diagnostic: Every required Middle endpoint scenario must complete.
Checks the maximum recorded stall window across all scenarios.

gates.actual: scenario_junior_baseline:120; scenario_level_first:120; scenario_support_first:120; scenario_mixed:120; scenario_skip_supports:120; scenario_low_click_middle:180; scenario_active_click_middle:90; scenario_offline_return_without_support:13; scenario_offline_return_with_support:120; scenario_no_support_completion:120; scenario_buy_max_milestone_crossing:1; scenario_endpoint_completion:120; scenario_capstone_reachability_sanity:660; scenario_full_run_low_engagement_info:180
gates.diagnostic: Stall windows are reported per scenario so Junior and Middle pacing can be tuned separately.
Runaway detection for endpoint before the minimum total duration.

gates.target: <= 5 levels per Buy Max before endpoint
gates.diagnostic: Runaway detection for Buy Max collapsing too many levels into one transaction.

gates.target: Immediate Support has at least one rational online purchase window
gates.diagnostic: Immediate Support viability is proven by at least one deterministic online policy buying it.

gates.target: Training Support has payback horizon and is not mandatory
gates.actual: payback recorded and no-support endpoint completed
gates.diagnostic: Training Support purchases record remaining-level payback and no-support completion proves it is not mandatory.

gates.target: Handover Support improves supported offline result
gates.diagnostic: Supported offline scenario legally unlocks and buys Handover Support before absence.

gates.target: mixed does not buy unsupported negative-utility Support Upgrades
gates.diagnostic: Mixed policy support purchases must have non-negative endpoint utility unless scenario objectives justify them.
